description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult human figure, with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a sharply angular, wing-like upper body structure. The head is small and detailed, featuring facial features and short, swept-back hair, while the torso and legs are stretched and twisted in an unnatural manner. The figure appears to be wearing a formal suit, with a collared shirt and jacket, and the lower body is contorted, with one leg bent and the other extended. The arms are fused into the large, angular forms that extend outward and upward, creating a dramatic, almost sculptural silhouette. The surface of the object is smooth and glossy, with sharp edges and reflective highlights. The overall appearance is surreal and abstract, deviating significantly from typical human proportions.
description: A surreal, distorted adult figure in a formal suit with exaggerated, angular limbs and a glossy, sculptural surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the small head, facial features, and the dramatic, wing-like angular extensions from the shoulders.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the extreme elongation and twisting of the legs and the sharp, reflective surfaces of the upper body.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the broad, angular upper body and the contorted, bent legs, with minimal detail on the back of the head.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the asymmetrical extension of the limbs and the glossy, faceted surfaces of the suit.
attribute_posture: contorted, crouched with limbs extended and twisted
